requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 (Southern Africa Ecosystem)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（南部非洲体系）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（南部非洲體系）

summary.en: Namibia's EV market is very nascent, but its vehicle imports, electrical practice, and regional infrastructure context sit within the Southern Africa IEC ecosystem. For passenger-vehicle charging, AC sites should expect IEC 62196-2 Type 2 where a dedicated EV connector is specified, and DC fast-charging sites should expect CCS Combo 2, IEC 62196-3 configuration FF, where a DC connector is specified by the site owner, fleet, network operator, or procurement document. Connector choice becomes mandatory when written into NSI-referenced standards, utility/site approval documents, tender requirements, fleet specifications, or charge-point-operator rules. No Namibia-specific alternative national EV connector standard was confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 纳米比亚EV市场仍处早期，但其车辆进口、电气实践及区域基础设施环境处于南部非洲IEC体系中。对于乘用车充电，在规定专用EV接口时，交流场站应预期采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2；在场地方、车队、网络运营商或采购文件规定直流接口时，直流快充应预期采用IEC 62196-3 FF配置的CCS Combo 2。当接口要求写入NSI引用标准、公用事业或场站批准文件、招标要求、车队规格或充电点运营商规则时，即成为强制项目要求。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认纳米比亚发布了替代性的本国EV接口标准。
summary.zht: 納米比亞EV市場仍處早期，但其車輛進口、電氣實踐及區域基礎設施環境處於南部非洲IEC體系中。對於乘用車充電，在規定專用EV接口時，交流場站應預期採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2；在場地方、車隊、網絡運營商或採購文件規定直流接口時，直流快充應預期採用IEC 62196-3 FF配置的CCS Combo 2。當接口要求寫入NSI引用標準、公用事業或場站批准文件、招標要求、車隊規格或充電點運營商規則時，即成為強制項目要求。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認納米比亞發布了替代性的本國EV接口標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories, including Type 2 configuration
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS Combo 2 configuration FF
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
NSI standards framework where IEC standards are adopted or referenced

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T 20234.2 may appear similar to IEC Type 2 but differs in connector gender, contact arrangement, and signaling assumptions. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack used in CCS2 deployments. A China GB/T-only charger is physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 infrastructure.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2外观可能与IEC Type 2相近，但在接口性别、触点排列和信号假设上不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2几何形状不同，并使用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS2部署中的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈。仅支持中国GB/T的充电桩与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基础设施在物理和电气层面不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2外觀可能與IEC Type 2相近，但在接口性別、觸點排列和信號假設上不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2幾何形狀不同，並使用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS2部署中的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧。僅支持中國GB/T的充電樁與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基礎設施在物理和電氣層面不兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to BMS communication
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements

gap.en: A GB/T-connector charger needs hardware change before Namibia IEC deployments: coupler geometry, cable assembly, locking, proximity and control-pilot behavior, labels, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, and DC communication stack must be redesigned and retested for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2. Adapters should not be treated as a project-compliance substitute. The required connector should be confirmed with the Namibia site owner, fleet, utility, operator, or procurement authority before quotation.
gap.zh: GB/T接口充电桩在纳米比亚IEC部署前需要硬件变更：耦合器几何形状、电缆组件、锁止、接近及控制导引行为、标签、温升证据、备件和直流通信栈均须按IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2重新设计并复测。不应将转接器视为项目合规替代方案。报价前应向纳米比亚场地方、车队、公用事业单位、运营商或采购机构确认所需接口。
gap.zht: GB/T接口充電樁在納米比亞IEC部署前需要硬體變更：耦合器幾何形狀、電纜組件、鎖止、接近及控制導引行為、標籤、溫升證據、備件和直流通訊棧均須按IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2重新設計並複測。不應將轉接器視為項目合規替代方案。報價前應向納米比亞場地方、車隊、公用事業單位、運營商或採購機構確認所需接口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by NSI-referenced standards, site owner, utility, fleet, operator, tender, or procurement specification; GB/T physical incompatibility makes direct substitution impossible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat connector conversion as hardware and protocol redesign. Namibia projects that specify IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 cannot use GB/T 20234 connectors without changing and retesting the connector system.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将接口转换视为硬件和协议重新设计。纳米比亚项目若规定IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2，则不能在不更换并复测接口系统的情况下使用GB/T 20234接口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將接口轉換視為硬體和協議重新設計。納米比亞項目若規定IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2，則不能在不更換並複測接口系統的情況下使用GB/T 20234接口。
